visible_observations: A massive mature bearded humanoid leans forward beneath a broken masonry arch fixed behind his shoulders.
The body is strongly asymmetric: one side is dark stone-crusted flesh while the other is pale, torn, hollowed, and corpse-like; the near hand is extended open toward the viewer.
Torn waist cloth, bare oversized feet, chained stonework, cracks, cavities, and eroded edges produce a dry, burdened ruin-material read.
strengths: The broken arch, extreme shoulder mass, and unequal arms create an immediately identifiable full-body shape.
Material wear and the split dark-versus-pale anatomy visibly establish bodily damage and supernatural burden without floating effects.
defects: The open palm reads as beckoning or pleading as readily as attacking, so hostile intent is less explicit than the body mass.
The masonry apparatus can read as a carried ruin or shrine before it reads as a combat function, and the face occupies too little of the master to clarify that ambiguity.
uncertainties: Unaided inspection does not establish whether the pale side is exposed anatomy, fused armor, or a second material transformation.
The exact gameplay role and intended target of the gesture are not visually certain.

visible_observations: Three black silhouettes explore a tall humanoid under a broken arch, a low four-point crouch beneath a cage-like curve, and a broad domed bell or cloak mass on planted feet.
The three candidates materially change height, center of gravity, negative space, limb exposure, and the relationship between body and architectural burden.
strengths: Candidate A uses the broken overhead arc, hanging side masses, and exposed legs to preserve a readable humanoid threat.
Candidates B and C demonstrate genuinely different low and monolithic alternatives rather than small costume variations.
defects: Candidate B's compressed body and circular cage merge into a dense central lump, while candidate C's dome conceals nearly all anatomy and action.
Only candidate A clearly combines a character body with the architectural motif at first glance.
uncertainties: The silhouette sheet alone does not label the selected candidate or show how the extra hanging side masses function in motion.

visible_observations: A mature bearded face is pitched downward under wet-looking dark hair, with compressed brows, narrowed eyes, deep forehead folds, a closed mouth, and a heavy set jaw.
The face sits between unequal damaged shoulders, which reinforces strain, endurance, and physical burden.
strengths: Age, damage, brow tension, and the lowered head create a specific exhausted, resentful vigilance rather than a neutral mannequin read.
The eye line remains confrontational despite the bowed posture.
defects: The expression resolves most strongly as a familiar stern scowl; the mouth and eye asymmetry do not clearly reveal a distinct want, fear, or manipulative relationship to the viewer.
The dark irises and heavy shadow reduce precision in the eye-focus read.
uncertainties: Without a visible target, it is unclear whether the active state is controlled threat, grief, fatigue, accusation, or appeal.

visible_observations: At native size, the broken overhead arch, broad asymmetrical shoulders, central hanging torso, separated legs, and oversized feet remain visible.
The extended hand, facial expression, hollow shoulder cavity, chains, and most internal stone-versus-flesh distinctions collapse into a dark brown-gray cluster.
strengths: The arch-and-giant-body combination survives as a distinctive unit silhouette at the frozen scale.
The stance reads as a large grounded front-line presence.
defects: The near-black background and low-chroma materials suppress internal separation, leaving the transformed anatomy and gesture unreadable.
Threat and psychology do not survive through the face; recognition depends chiefly on the arch and body mass.
uncertainties: The native image does not establish whether players would distinguish the open-hand action or the two anatomical materials during gameplay.
